title: dactylorhiza traunsteineri subsp. traunsteinerioides
intro: Dactylorhiza traunsteineri subsp. traunsteinerioides, also known as Traunstein's Marsh Orchid or Traunstein's Marsh Orchid subsp. Traunstein's Marsh Orchid, is a type of orchid plant that belongs to the Dactylorhiza genus. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza traunsteineri subsp. traunsteinerioides include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
